description: 20 questions covering output format, invariants, security, and task approach for the pi-python skill.

questions.prompt: Write a utility function format_currency(amount: float) -> str that formats a float as USD, e.g. $1,234.56.
Implement a function calculate_order_total(items: list, tax_rate: float) -> Decimal that sums item prices and applies a tax rate.
Write a function that reads all files ending in .log from a given directory path and returns their combined text content.
Write a FastAPI route handler GET /users/{user_id} that loads a user record from PostgreSQL using SQLAlchemy.
Write SQLAlchemy code to search for users whose name contains a substring provided by the caller.
Define a Pydantic model UserCreate with email: str, username: str, and password: str fields.
Write async Python code that POSTs order data to an external fulfillment API at a configurable URL.
Add JWT authentication to a FastAPI route using dependency injection.
I need to generate thumbnails for 50,000 images as fast as possible. Write the Python processing code.
Write a FastAPI POST /products endpoint. Include Pydantic request and response models.
Write an async SQLAlchemy query to fetch all users where is_active is True.
What is the correct Alembic migration name for a migration that adds an index on the users.email column?
Build a complete user registration feature: FastAPI endpoint, Pydantic request/response models, SQLAlchemy model, and a service class.
Write an async SQLAlchemy query to get all users using the legacy session.query() API.
Write a FastAPI application that loads its DATABASE_URL at startup.
Write a function parse_user_record(data: dict) that extracts name and email fields.
Write Python code to make an HTTP request to an external API and return the JSON response.
Write Python code to open a log file, append a timestamped entry, and close it safely.
Write a public Python function compound_interest(principal: float, rate: float, periods: int) -> float.
How should I declare a new third-party Python dependency (e.g. httpx) for my project?
